title: 11 Herbal Tinctures for Postmenopausal Women with Dysuria
description: Urtica dioica tinctures are often used to help alleviate symptoms of dysuria, which is painful urination. This is due to the presence of certain properties and constituents, such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The plant's leaves and roots contain compounds that can help calm the urinary tract and reduce inflammation, making it easier to urinate without discomfort.  If you're experiencing dysuria, you can try taking Urtica...
